flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bushnell University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.3k → $35.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bushnell University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.3k → $35.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bushnell University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bushnell University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (470 → 517).
